name: Scareclaw Twinsaw
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>肆世壊の双牙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スケアクロー・ツインソー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute 1 "Scareclaw" monster, then target 2 cards your opponent controls; destroy them, and if you do, if you control "Visas Starfrost", banish those destroyed cards instead of sending them to the GY. If a Link-3 or higher monster is on the field: You can banish this card from your GY; for the rest of this turn, neither player can activate the effects of Link Monsters on the field. You can only activate 1 "Scareclaw Twinsaw" per turn.
eff: Tribute 1 "Scareclaw" monster, then target 2 cards your opponent controls; destroy them, and if you do, if you control "Visas Starfrost", banish those destroyed cards instead of sending them to the GY. If a Link-3 or higher monster is on the field: You can banish this card from your GY; for the rest of this turn, neither player can activate the effects of Link Monsters on the field. You can only activate 1 "Scareclaw Twinsaw" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Link Rating
